description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic gray finish and a minimalist design. The screen is open, displaying a black background with the 'Avell' logo in the center, indicating the brand. The keyboard is full-sized, featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a function row, and a large trackpad is positioned below the keyboard. The laptop's lid is smooth with the 'Avell' logo subtly embossed in the center. Ports are visible along the sides, including USB and possibly HDMI, suggesting versatile connectivity. The overall build appears sturdy and sleek, suitable for both professional and casual urban environments.
description: A sleek, metallic gray Avell laptop with a full keyboard, large trackpad, and visible side ports. The screen is open, displaying the Avell logo on a black background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with the Avell logo, full keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth metallic lid with the Avell logo centered.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and additional side ports.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Avell' logo is visible on both the screen (centered, white text) and the lid (centered, subtle embossing).
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off except for the Avell logo displayed on a black background.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row; no numeric keypad is visible.
